subcodes.first_line: O My Leaf! O My Handmaiden! The Wronged One hath turned toward thee from the precincts of the Prison, and maketh mention of thee in recompense for thy turning unto Him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ورقتی یا امتی قد اقبل الیک المظلوم من شطر السجن و یذکرک جزآء اقبالک و
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @knowledge; recognition of God
